# Pull Request – LIET Contributions

## Project Details
- **Project Name:**  
- **Roll Number:**  
- **Department:**  
- **Year / Batch:**  

---

## Team Members
- Full Name 1  
- Full Name 2  
- Full Name 3  

---

## Type of Contribution
Select one:

- [ ] New Project Submission  
- [ ] Enhancement / Improvement  
- [ ] Bug Fix  
- [ ] Documentation Update  

---

## Checklist (Important)
Before submitting your PR, make sure:

- [ ] I have uploaded files in the correct **department repository**
- [ ] I have added my project in the correct **batch folder**
- [ ] My project folder is properly named
- [ ] I have not modified unrelated files
- [ ] My files are clean and well-structured
- [ ] I have followed the PR title format

---

## PR Title Format
`<Project Name> | <Roll Number>`

### Example:
`AI Chatbot for Students | 22A51A0001`



## Final Step
Click **Create Pull Request** and you're done! 🎉

---

> ⚠️ Note:
> - Incorrect submissions may be rejected  
> - Follow guidelines strictly for faster approval  

---
